prestazioni: Engine swap to a **Type 4 (EA113) 2.0L TFSI (engine code: CDL)** with a **Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger**, forged internals (Mahle pistons, Manley H-beam rods), and a **Bosch Motorsport 0261S02088 high-pressure fuel pump** for 350+ HP on E85
Custom **02A 6-speed transmission** with a **Quaife ATB differential**, uprated **Sachs Performance clutch (3-disc ceramic)**, and a **G25 short shifter** for precise gear engagement

Full **KW Clubsport coilovers (3-way adjustable)** with **Eibach Pro-Kit springs**, **Powerflex polybushings (front/rear subframe)**, and **Brembo GT 4-piston calipers** with **330mm slotted rotors** for track-ready stopping power
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit** (Type 4-specific fenders, custom front bumper with integrated **Hella Rallye 1000 lights**) for aggressive stance and improved aerodynamics
**OEM+ resto-mod interior** with **Recaro SRD Evo seats (Type 4-specific mounts)**, **Nardi Classic steering wheel (380mm)**, and **Vintage Air Gen-IV climate control** for modern comfort

**Custom livery** in **VW Motorsport ‘70s rally colors (Lime Green/White/Black)** with **3M 1080 vinyl wrap**, **Hella Supertones (dual-tone)**, and **BBS RS 15x8 ET20 wheels** with **Pirelli P-Zero Trofeo R tires (205/50/15)**
